# CORE_SERVICES
services: cosmetic dentistry, smile makeover, dental implants, root canal treatment, teeth whitening, crowns and bridges, full mouth rehabilitation, preventive dentistry

# SPECIALTY_TREATMENTS
painless_dentistry: Use of modern anesthesia and techniques to minimize discomfort during dental procedures.
tooth_preservation: Focus on saving natural teeth and stabilizing mobile teeth where clinically feasible instead of extraction.
cosmetic_speed: Smile enhancement procedures designed for shorter treatment duration compared to traditional orthodontics in selected cases.
oral_ulcer_management: Clinical evaluation and management of persistent or non-healing oral ulcers with appropriate diagnosis.
trauma_care: Emergency dental care for teeth damaged or lost due to accidents.
advanced_materials: Use of modern and MRI-compatible dental materials for crowns and prosthetics where applicable.
